initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN Track.Milliseconds < 180000 THEN 'short' 
        WHEN Track.Milliseconds <= 300000 THEN 'medium' 
        ELSE 'long' 
    END AS duration_category,
    MIN(Track.Milliseconds) / 60000.0 AS min_duration_minutes,
    MAX(Track.Milliseconds) / 60000.0 AS max_duration_minutes,
    SUM(InvoiceLine.UnitPrice * InvoiceLine.Quantity) AS total_revenue
FROM Track
JOIN InvoiceLine ON Track.TrackId = InvoiceLine.TrackId
GROUP BY 
    CASE 
        WHEN Track.Milliseconds < 180000 THEN 'short' 
        WHEN Track.Milliseconds <= 300000 THEN 'medium' 
        ELSE 'long' 
    END;

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN Track.Milliseconds < 180000 THEN 'short' 
        WHEN Track.Milliseconds <= 300000 THEN 'medium' 
        ELSE 'long' 
    END AS duration_category,
    MIN(Track.Milliseconds) AS min_duration_ms,
    MAX(Track.Milliseconds) AS max_duration_ms,
    SUM(InvoiceLine.UnitPrice * InvoiceLine.Quantity) AS total_revenue
FROM Track
JOIN InvoiceLine ON Track.TrackId = InvoiceLine.TrackId
GROUP BY duration_category;

SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN Track.Milliseconds < 180000 THEN 'short' 
    WHEN Track.Milliseconds <= 300000 THEN 'medium' 
    ELSE 'long' 
  END AS duration_category,
  MIN(Track.Milliseconds) AS min_duration_ms,
  MAX(Track.Milliseconds) AS max_duration_ms,
  SUM(InvoiceLine.UnitPrice * InvoiceLine.Quantity) AS total_revenue
FROM Track
JOIN InvoiceLine ON Track.TrackId = InvoiceLine.TrackId
GROUP BY 
  CASE 
    WHEN Track.Milliseconds < 180000 THEN 'short' 
    WHEN Track.Milliseconds <= 300000 THEN 'medium' 
    ELSE 'long' 
  END;

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN Track.Milliseconds < 180000 THEN 'short' 
        WHEN Track.Milliseconds <= 300000 THEN 'medium' 
        ELSE 'long' 
    END AS duration_category,
    MIN(Track.Milliseconds) AS min_duration_ms,
    MAX(Track.Milliseconds) AS max_duration_ms,
    SUM(InvoiceLine.UnitPrice * InvoiceLine.Quantity) AS total_revenue
FROM Track
JOIN InvoiceLine ON Track.TrackId = InvoiceLine.TrackId
GROUP BY 
    CASE 
        WHEN Track.Milliseconds < 180000 THEN 'short' 
        WHEN Track.Milliseconds <= 300000 THEN 'medium' 
        ELSE 'long' 
    END;

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN Track.Milliseconds < 180000 THEN 'short' 
        WHEN Track.Milliseconds <= 300000 THEN 'medium' 
        ELSE 'long' 
    END AS duration_category,
    MIN(Track.Milliseconds) AS min_duration_ms,
    MAX(Track.Milliseconds) AS max_duration_ms,
    SUM(InvoiceLine.UnitPrice * InvoiceLine.Quantity) AS total_revenue
FROM Track
JOIN InvoiceLine ON Track.TrackId = InvoiceLine.TrackId
GROUP BY duration_category;
